title: rubus substrictus
intro: Rubus substrictus, also known as the Japanese wineberry or Chinese wineberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family. The plant is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus substrictus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Rubus substrictus can be consumed as a tea, taken as a capsule or tablet, or used topically as a cream or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
